name: niu-image-gen
description: Generate and edit images through configurable OpenAI-compatible API endpoints, with batch workflows and local settings.

interface.shortDescription: Image generation with configurable API endpoints and batch mode.
interface.longDescription: Generate and edit images through configurable OpenAI-compatible APIs. Customize protocol, host, port, request path, API key, and model while retaining quality controls, batch generation, concurrent processing, and local settings.
defaultPrompt: I want to generate some images
